category_anchors.Dress: Dress: A dress is a one-piece outer garment that is worn on the torso, hangs down over the legs, and often consist of a bodice attached to a skirt
category_anchors.Bottomwear: Bottomwear: Bottomwear refers to clothing worn on the lower part of the body, such as trousers, jeans, skirts, shorts, and leggings
category_anchors.Socks: Socks: Socks are a type of clothing worn on the feet, typically made of soft fabric, designed to provide comfort and warmth
category_anchors.Topwear: Topwear: Topwear refers to clothing worn on the upper part of the body, such as shirts, blouses, t-shirts, and jackets
category_anchors.Innerwear: Innerwear: Innerwear refers to clothing worn beneath outer garments, typically close to the skin, such as underwear, bras, and undershirts

cascade_form: 5-anchor sem_classify cascade. dase argmax over 5 category anchors on text embedding; confidence = top1-top2; > TAU_HIGH -> dase label, else BQ AI.CLASSIFY on staging

data.scope_filter: masterCategory='Apparel' AND subCategory NOT IN (Saree, Apparel Set, Loungewear and Nightwear)

calibration._caveat: Q5 uses AI.CLASSIFY (single-token output). Token usage similar to AI.GENERATE_BOOL

baseline.sql:
WITH product_selection AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM fashion_product_images.STYLES_DETAILS styles_details
  WHERE TRUE
    AND masterCategory.typeName = 'Apparel'
    AND subCategory.typeName NOT IN ('Saree', 'Apparel Set', 'Loungewear and Nightwear')
)
SELECT
  id,
  AI.CLASSIFY(
    ('You are given a description of a product. Your task is to classify the product. ',
     'The product description is as follows: ',
     styles_details.productDisplayName, ' ', styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value),
    categories => [
      ('Dress', 'A dress is a one-piece outer garment that is worn on the torso, hangs down over the legs, and often consist of a bodice attached to a skirt.'),
      ('Bottomwear', 'Bottomwear refers to clothing worn on the lower part of the body, such as trousers, jeans, skirts, shorts, and leggings.'),
      ('Socks', 'Socks are a type of clothing worn on the feet, typically made of soft fabric, designed to provide comfort and warmth.'),
      ('Topwear', 'Topwear refers to clothing worn on the upper part of the body, such as shirts, blouses, t-shirts, and jackets'),
      ('Innerwear', 'Innerwear refers to clothing worn beneath outer garments, typically close to the skin, such as underwear, bras, and undershirts.')
    ],
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  ) AS category
FROM product_selection styles_details

stage2_run.sql:
WITH product_selection AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM fashion_product_images.q5_uncertain styles_details
  WHERE TRUE
    AND masterCategory.typeName = 'Apparel'
    AND subCategory.typeName NOT IN ('Saree', 'Apparel Set', 'Loungewear and Nightwear')
)
SELECT
  id,
  AI.CLASSIFY(
    ('You are given a description of a product. Your task is to classify the product. ',
     'The product description is as follows: ',
     styles_details.productDisplayName, ' ', styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value),
    categories => [
      ('Dress', 'A dress is a one-piece outer garment that is worn on the torso, hangs down over the legs, and often consist of a bodice attached to a skirt.'),
      ('Bottomwear', 'Bottomwear refers to clothing worn on the lower part of the body, such as trousers, jeans, skirts, shorts, and leggings.'),
      ('Socks', 'Socks are a type of clothing worn on the feet, typically made of soft fabric, designed to provide comfort and warmth.'),
      ('Topwear', 'Topwear refers to clothing worn on the upper part of the body, such as shirts, blouses, t-shirts, and jackets'),
      ('Innerwear', 'Innerwear refers to clothing worn beneath outer garments, typically close to the skin, such as underwear, bras, and undershirts.')
    ],
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  ) AS category
FROM product_selection styles_details
